---
title: "Guyaclim raw data"
author: Sylvain Schmitt -
date: today
date-format: medium
format: 
  gfm:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

All the raw data from Guyaclim organized first by site and then by project and sensors (listed data below). Available sites are :

-   Paracou : description with link.

```{r, comment=""}
fs::dir_tree(recurse = 2)
```
